description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-stack

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-stack/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Gap/spacing. Direction.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Layout component — no semantic impact. Reading order matches visual order.
3. **Functionality** — Vertical/horizontal. Gap sizes. Alignment (start/center/end/stretch). Wrap. Reverse. Responsive direction.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. Flexbox layout. CSS Parts. Gap tokens.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All API documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Direction. Gap. Alignment. Wrap. Responsive.
8. **Storybook** — Vertical/horizontal. Gaps. Alignment. Nested. Responsive.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Layout utility. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-stack
